mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM sys_config WHERE deleted = 0
AND config_key LIKE '%' || #{configKey} || '%'
AND config_name LIKE '%' || #{configName} || '%'
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_config WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_config (config_key, config_value, config_name, description) VALUES (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{configName}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_config SET config_key = #{configKey}, config_value = #{configValue}, config_name = #{configName}, description = #{description}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_config SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
